goals.title: Clean up the local Codegraph indexing for /Users/slit/dev/recova-debt...
goals.objective: Clean up the local Codegraph indexing for /Users/slit/dev/recova-debt-brain so the supported source-code surface is indexed consistently. Baseline evidence shows .codegraph is live and indexes 1245 files, but three tracked Python files under trustgraph-vertexai/trustgraph/model/text_completion/vertexai are missing. Diagnose and repair the local codegraph setup without committing the codegraph database. Prove with CLI/data evidence that supported Python/YAML/JS candidates match the codegraph files table, core debt-brain symbols resolve through codegraph, there are zero indexing errors, cleanup receipts are recorded, and any durable repo docs or scripts are committed and pushed if changed.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI/data surface: run a repo-vs-codegraph source coverage check that lists tracked Python/YAML/JS files, compares them with sqlite .codegraph/codegraph.db files, and prints SOURCE_COVERAGE_OK only when missing=0, extra=0, indexed_errors=0.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/evidence/codegraph-index-cleanup-20260708/source-coverage.txt: SOURCE_COVERAGE_OK missing=0 extra=0 indexed_errors=0; RED proof: .omo/evidence/codegraph-index-cleanup-20260708/source-coverage-red.txt showed missing=3 before repair; cleanup: mktemp compare files removed, no tmux/server/browser/temp runtime resources left

successCriteria.scenario: Codegraph MCP real surface: query the formerly missing vertexai file and a core debt-brain workflow symbol through codegraph; PASS iff vertexai/llm.py resolves as an indexed file and evaluate_claim_domain_decision / evaluate_workflow_judgment still resolve through codegraph.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/evidence/codegraph-index-cleanup-20260708/codegraph-real-surface.txt: CODEGRAPH_REAL_SURFACE_OK vertexai=yes debt_brain=yes; MCP probe also resolved vertexai/llm.py with 16 symbols and debt-brain symbols; cleanup: no tmux/server/browser/temp runtime resources created

successCriteria.scenario: CLI/git cleanup surface: verify .codegraph remains ignored/local-only, git status has no uncommitted tracked product files after any durable doc/script change, cleanup receipts exist, and any git-tracked durable changes are committed and pushed.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/codegraph-index-cleanup-20260708/final-cleanup.txt containing CODEGRAPH_CLEANUP_OK and commit/push hash if tracked files changed, or NO_GIT_CHANGE_REQUIRED if none changed.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/evidence/codegraph-index-cleanup-20260708/final-cleanup.txt: CODEGRAPH_CLEANUP_OK commit=4356b7c9 pushed=yes local_db_ignored=yes; cleanup: no tmux/server/browser/temp runtime resources; mktemp files removed; codegraph DB remains local ignored state
successCriteria.notes: Durable setup fix was committed and pushed as 4356b7c9; ULW evidence artifacts will be committed in a final evidence commit.

goals.evidence: CodeGraph indexing cleanup complete: supported source coverage is 1248/1248 with missing=0 extra=0 indexed_errors=0; vertexai provider source and core debt-brain workflow symbols resolve through CodeGraph; .codegraph remains local-only; fix commit 4356b7c9 pushed; quality gate approved.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/codegraph-index-cleanup-20260708/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/codegraph-index-cleanup-20260708/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

aggregateCompletion.evidence: CodeGraph indexing cleanup complete: supported source coverage is 1248/1248 with missing=0 extra=0 indexed_errors=0; vertexai provider source and core debt-brain workflow symbols resolve through CodeGraph; .codegraph remains local-only; fix commit 4356b7c9 pushed; quality gate approved.

codexGoal.objective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/codegraph-index-cleanup-20260708/goals.json; clean up local Codegraph indexing for /Users/slit/dev/recova-debt-brain and record evidence in .omo/ulw-loop/codegraph-index-cleanup-20260708/ledger.jsonl.
